title: Pulser Form Validation Result
description: Structured output from the pulser-form-validator-v1 workflow. Returns validation status and next safe action for active Odoo form questions.

normalized_intent.description: The normalized intent derived from the user's short/noisy form question.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation grounded in record field values.

missing_fields.description: Fields that must be populated before the check can compute.

checks_run.description: List of validation checks executed against the current record.

safe_action.description: The next smallest safe action the user can take. Null or empty if status is correct and no transition is needed.

visible_field_refs.description: Field names from the active form that were used as grounding evidence.
